headline: Morgan Stanley warns chip trade looks like silver
detail: Wilson's comparison to silver flags a crowded, momentum-driven trade at risk of a sharp unwind. This directly hits your heaviest exposure — AVGO, SMH, CRWD, and QQQ are all chip or tech-momentum names. When crowded trades reverse, margin accounts feel it hardest.

headline: Mag Seven momentum hits fourth-worst stretch in 22 years
detail: The headline says 70% of the time there's a recovery, but the near-term pain is real and already showing in your book. AVGO and PLTR are both down double digits, and this macro momentum pressure explains why your SELL signals are stacking up. Don't let a stat about eventual recovery talk you out of managing current risk.

headline: SpaceX $25B bond sale — huge demand but investor headache
detail: You hold both SPCX and SPAL, two SpaceX-linked instruments. A massive bond issuance can dilute equity upside and signals SpaceX is raising cheap debt rather than rushing to maximize share value. Worth watching how SPCX reacts given it's a brand-new IPO with almost no trading history.

headline: Apple pivots to China for memory amid microchip crisis
detail: This keeps the chip supply story front and center — and not in a bullish way. Supply chain fragmentation and big-tech workarounds reduce urgency for domestic chip names like AVGO. Adds another headwind to a sector already under momentum pressure.
